originalTitle: Wall Street ends higher as SpaceX's market debut dominates
summary: STORY: Wall Street's main indexes ended higher on Friday, as SpaceX shares surged in their debut, making it Wall Street's biggest public listing in history. The Dow jumped seven-tenths of a percent, the S&P 500 added half a percent and the Nasdaq gained just under a third of a percent. :: SpaceX Investors were glued to the trajectory of SpaceX shares, which began trading on the Nasdaq on Friday. The stock soared more than 19%, closing well above the IPO price of $135. That put the rocket maker's market cap at over $2 trillion, and made CEO Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire. Alexander Morris is CEO and chief investment officer at F/m Investments. "What is a trillion? If you think of a million being a lot, there's another million of those. There's 1000 billions that you should put together when you start to think of just how crazy big this number is. [FLASH] And by the way, it's probably going to keep going up from here. So he's the world's first trillionaire. He might be the first multi-trillionaire at some level, which seems not unfathomable. Maybe somewhat embarrassingly though, and I'm certain this won't be lost on Elon, SpaceX came out and it's worth more than Tesla today." Shares of Tesla also gained, nudging up by nearly 2%. :: SpaceX Meanwhile, shares of other space stocks, which had soared in the lead-up to SpaceX's debut, eased on Friday. Rocket Lab's stock fell nearly 11%, while Intuitive Machines shed more than 13% and Planet Labs declined nearly 9%. Elsewhere in the market, shares of Adobe slid almost 7% after the exit of the software maker's CFO.

The stock soared more than 19%, closing well above the IPO price of $135. That put the rocket maker's market cap at over $2 trillion, and made CEO Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire. Alexander Morris is CEO and chief investment officer at F/m Investments. "What is a trillion? If you think of a million being a lot, there's another million of those. There's 1000 billions that you should put together when you start to think of just how crazy big this number is. [FLASH] And by the way, it's probably going to keep going up from here. So he's the world's first trillionaire. He might be the first multi-trillionaire at some level, which seems not unfathomable. Maybe somewhat embarrassingly though, and I'm certain this won't be lost on Elon, SpaceX came out and it's worth more than Tesla today." chineseTitle: SpaceX 首次亮相，华尔街股市收高
chineseSummary: 故事：周五，华尔街主要股指收高，SpaceX 股价首次亮相，股价飙升，成为华尔街历史上规模最大的公开上市交易。道琼斯指数上涨了十分之七，标准普尔 500 指数上涨了半个百分点，纳斯达克指数上涨了不到三分之一。 :: SpaceX 投资者密切关注 SpaceX 股票的走势，该股票于周五开始在纳斯达克交易。该股飙升逾 19%，收盘价远高于 135 美元的 IPO 价格。这使得这家火箭制造商的市值超过 2 万亿美元，并使首席执行官埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 成为世界上第一位万亿富翁。 Alexander Morris 是 F/m Investments 的首席执行官兼首席投资官。 “什么是一万亿？如果你认为一百万很多，那么还有另外一百万。当你开始思考这个数字有多么疯狂时，你应该把一万亿放在一起。[FLASH]顺便说一句，它可能会从这里继续上升。所以他是世界上第一个万亿富翁。在某种程度上，他可能是第一个数万亿富翁，这似乎并不深不可测。也许有点尴尬不过，我确信埃隆不会忽视这一点，SpaceX 出现了，它今天的价值比特斯拉还要高。”特斯拉的股价也上涨了近 2%。 :: SpaceX 与此同时，在 SpaceX 首次亮相之前飙升的其他太空股票的股价周五下跌。 Rocket Lab 股价下跌近 11%，Intuitive Machines 股价下跌超过 13%，Planet Labs 股价下跌近 9%。在市场的其他地方，软件制造商 CFO 离职后，Adobe 的股价下跌了近 7%。

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
